fields.name: Automation name

trigger.label: Trigger — when does it fire?
trigger.on_enter_stage_desc: Fires immediately when a deal enters this stage.
trigger.date_desc: Cron check every hour. Fires N days before a date field.
trigger.on_create_desc: Fires when a new deal/lead is created.

actionDesc.tg_notify: Send a Telegram message to the owner or a specific user
actionDesc.create_task: Creates an Activity of type 'task' with a deadline
actionDesc.generate_document: Generate a document from a template and attach it to the deal
actionDesc.change_owner: Reassign deal by rule (round-robin, product, country)
actionDesc.change_stage: Move the deal to another pipeline stage
actionDesc.webhook: Send an HTTP request to an external URL
